arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso responds to Real Madrid rumours amid speculation over Carlo Ancelotti's future
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen boss Xabi Alonso responds to rumours linking him with the Real Madrid job following fresh reports regarding Carlo Ancelotti's future.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso responds to Real Madrid question after Carlo Ancelotti claims
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti is rumoured to have decided to leave his post at the end of season, sparking speculation that Xabi Alonso will be brought in to replace him

arts.ttl: Real Madrid set to fall short according to UEFA
arts.sum: A UEFA simulation study (conducted before the competition started) of accumulated points at the end of league stage in the new Champions League suggests that the the eighth-placed team will have around 17 points (17.1), a tally that is currently beyond Real Madrid’s grasp with the study also offering a sliver of hope for Girona should the Catalan side win their final two games . As things stand, Barça, who sit with 15 points would currently only need two more to be in the top-8 (they have to play against Benfica away and Atalanta at home ); Atlético Madrid could also progress with positive results against Leverkusen and Salzburg .
